description: FCB universal department research synthesis — composable primitives for any company type

departments.name: Executive / Strategy
departments.purpose: Define mission, business model, goals, decision rights, escalation policy, and operating cadence.
universal_responsibilities: Set and refresh company mission and priorities
Allocate attention and budget across departments
Maintain decision log and weekly operating plan
Define what requires chairman or human approval

smoke_tests.check: a single paragraph mission + target customer + promise.
a weekly review note and a quarterly strategy memo template.
at least 3 recent decisions with owners and review dates.
top priorities with success metrics and stop conditions.
top risks with severity, mitigations, and escalation owners.
"what requires a human" is listed and used.

software.notes: Roadmap, prioritization, technical debt vs feature tradeoffs

physical_product.notes: SKU strategy, margin targets, supplier risk

creator.notes: Brand direction, monetization mix, platform risk

publishing.notes: Imprint strategy, catalog priorities, launch calendar

education_community.notes: Curriculum vision, community norms, certification goals

departments.name: Product / Service Delivery
departments.purpose: Define how the company creates and ships what it sells — software, physical goods, services, content, courses, or local work.
universal_responsibilities: Run delivery stages from idea to shipped
Define acceptance criteria and evidence rules
Coordinate builders and handoffs to QA
Track delivery blockers and customer promise fit
Maintain ship/fulfillment checklists and post-ship learning loop

smoke_tests.check: deliverable intake fields are defined and used.
a reusable acceptance + evidence checklist template exists.
delivery stages are named with exit criteria for each stage.
delivery→ops/support handoff packet template exists.
for high-stakes work, a rollback or repair plan is defined before ship.
every shipped deliverable produces a short verdict memo within a fixed window.

departments.name: Operations / SOPs
departments.purpose: Turn repeated work into procedures, checklists, schedules, handoffs, vendor coordination, and repair loops.
universal_responsibilities: Author and maintain SOPs and runbooks

smoke_tests.check: at least one SOP per recurring workflow (or per high-volume workflow).
at least one handoff checklist used between major departments.
a schedule record with owner + cadence for recurring work.
blocked-work threshold and escalation owner routing is documented and used.
SOPs have owners and review dates (staleness doesn't silently accumulate).

departments.name: Marketing
departments.purpose: Research market, position offer, produce copy and campaigns across SEO, email, social, ads, launch, and CRO.
universal_responsibilities: Produce channel-appropriate copy and creative direction
Plan and execute launches and campaigns

smoke_tests.check: brand brief or positioning doc exists

local_service.notes: Local SEO, reviews, service area marketing

departments.name: Sales / Revenue
departments.purpose: Handle leads, pipeline, qualification, proposals, pricing presentation, closing, CRM, and account expansion.
universal_responsibilities: Hand off closed deals to delivery and success

smoke_tests.check: a documented pipeline schema with named stages and qualification criteria (`pipeline-schema` artifact).
at least one staged deal with an owner and current status in CRM.
recent deals have qualification records, not just stage moves.
a current proposal template reflecting approved pricing.
at least one completed handoff checklist for a closed deal.
"what requires a human" is listed and used for discounts, custom pricing, partnership terms, and signature.

departments.name: Customer Success / Support
departments.purpose: Onboarding, support, retention, feedback, refunds, complaints, and renewal flows.
universal_responsibilities: Handle support tickets and SLA tracking
Process refunds and escalations per policy

smoke_tests.check: support intake fields defined

departments.name: Finance / Accounting
departments.purpose: Track pricing, revenue, costs, margins, budgets, invoices, taxes, and financial approval gates.
universal_responsibilities: Enforce spend and discount approval gates

smoke_tests.check: budget policy schema defined

software.notes: SaaS metrics, infra costs, contractor spend

creator.notes: Ad spend, platform revenue, sponsorship income

departments.name: Legal / Compliance
departments.purpose: Contracts, licenses, privacy, terms, regulated claims, warranties, and legal escalation.
universal_responsibilities: Maintain terms, privacy, and contract templates
Gate regulated claims and ad compliance
Review IP, license, and employment/contractor risk

smoke_tests.check: a legal-checklist exists covering terms, privacy, and core contract templates.
at least one recent regulated-claim review with decision, rationale, and review date.
terms, privacy, and contractor agreement templates exist with version markers.
active artifacts are tagged with a risk tier and escalation path.
the four human-approval gates are listed and referenced from claim/contract workflows.
recent claims-check / ip-license-check / privacy-check / contract-risk verdicts are archived.

software.notes: SaaS terms, data privacy, OSS licenses

departments.name: People / Contractors
departments.purpose: Role definitions, hiring briefs, onboarding, contractor packets, deliverable review, and offboarding.
universal_responsibilities: Define role profiles and hiring briefs

smoke_tests.check: core role profiles exist

departments.name: Analytics / Reporting
departments.purpose: KPIs, dashboards, experiment readouts, weekly/monthly reports, and evidence capture.
universal_responsibilities: Define KPI schema per company type

smoke_tests.check: KPI definitions exist for company type

departments.name: Tooling / IT / Security
departments.purpose: Accounts, tools, integrations, credentials, environments, automations, access control, and smoke tests.
universal_responsibilities: Run tool readiness and integration health checks
Enforce access scope and backup policies
Own shared tool manifest standard for all departments

smoke_tests.check: foreman tools doctor passes for composed manifest

departments.name: Quality / Foreman Inspection
departments.purpose: Core Foreman discipline: builder → inspector → Foreman arbitration → fix loop → evidence.
universal_responsibilities: Enforce evidence standards on all deliverables
Perform closeout sweep before marking work done

smoke_tests.check: every active module has `inspection_standards` declared in its `module.json`.
the escalation-protocol is linked from the inspection loop and known to the Foreman.
at least one recent inspection-verdict with per-inspector results and (if any) arbitration record.
the artifact-index has entries for recently accepted deliverables.
recent done-work has a closeout-sweep record confirming all inspectors passed.
three-strike-escalation, force-close, and waive-inspection gates are listed and used.

departments.name: Research / Intelligence
departments.purpose: Standing research function for market, competitor, and customer-language intelligence before strategy and GTM decisions.
universal_responsibilities: Run market and competitor research protocols
Mine customer language from reviews and support
Produce synthesis memos for executive and GTM

smoke_tests.check: research protocol doc exists

departments.name: Procurement / Vendor / Supply Chain
departments.purpose: Vendors, suppliers, inventory, manufacturing, shipping, and fulfillment partners.

smoke_tests.check: vendor database schema defined

departments.name: Distribution / Channel Management
departments.purpose: Where and how the product reaches customers — separate from marketing message.

smoke_tests.check: active channels documented

departments.name: Risk / Insurance / Business Continuity
departments.purpose: Operational, platform, financial risk; insurance; backups; continuity plans.

smoke_tests.check: risk register initialized

departments.name: Knowledge / Documentation
departments.purpose: Living source of truth: SOPs, decisions, customer insights, product facts, tool docs, runbooks.

smoke_tests.check: wiki structure defined
decision log accessible
